meta.northy_message: ESC-10 proposal due in 48h. Patrick equity cliff in 20 days — Scale Firm status unknown. Garland has a lever nobody's pulled: Moak Casey has the superintendent's ear. And Garry Tan just shipped gstack — read it before July.

act_now.title: Garland $140K — Use the Moak Casey Lever (June 30)
act_now.detail: Michael Ruiz unreachable since June 10. June 30 is 5 days. G-Brain has the play: Moak Casey's Jodi agreed in May to email Dr. Rick Lopez (Garland superintendent) once Steve debriefed her. That debrief happened. Nobody followed up. Moak Casey also has Buck's contacts at Garland. This is a two-step: (1) DM Jodi one sentence asking her to put in the word now. (2) Follow up with Michael framing ESC-10 as new context.
act_now.action: DM Jodi at Moak Casey — one sentence re: Garland superintendent. Then call/email Michael Ruiz with ESC-10 hook.

act_now.title: Patrick Equity Cliff — 20 Days — Scale Firm Status Unknown
act_now.detail: July 15 is hard. The June 19 Charlie call was supposed to close open items so written consent circulated 'next week.' That was 6 days ago. Scale Firm needs to draft the board consent resolution. All 5 board members must sign electronically. Patrick permanently loses vesting credit if this doesn't execute before July 15.
act_now.action: Email or call Scale Firm Thursday morning. Confirm consent is drafted. If not, escalate immediately to Charlie.

intel.title: gstack — Role-Based AI Engineering Team (23 Specialists)
intel.pattern: Omni-bot is dead. Thin harness + fat specialist skills = ships. 23 roles as slash commands (CEO review, Eng Manager, Designer, QA, Security, Release Engineer). Garry claims 810x his 2013 code pace. The bottleneck is scaffolding, not model intelligence.
intel.applies_to: July AI architecture sprint — role clarity for Bookmarked fleet (Dewey + subordinates). /office-hours forces assumptions open before code is written. Same gap exists in current agent prompting.
intel.priority: Queue for review — read before July 7 L10

intel.title: Senses & Reflexes — Integration Architecture for GBrain
intel.pattern: Recipe format (YAML + markdown). Senses = data inputs. Reflexes = brain state-change triggers. Agents ARE the runtime — recipes ARE the installer.
intel.applies_to: Hermes skill ecosystem — formalizes what Northy does as shareable recipes

intel.title: Two-Stage LLM Pipeline — Propose then Critique
intel.pattern: Stage 1 proposes clusters. Stage 2 critiques/corrects. Dynamic schemas enforce completeness. Precision-first architecture.
intel.applies_to: Mabel book intelligence / district benchmarking pipeline
